visuals.title: Text Classification Pipeline
visuals.description: Visual diagram for text classification apps
visuals.svgContent:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="420" height="350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#E3F2FD"/>
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#BBDEFB"/>
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  <rect width="420" height="350" fill="url(#bg)" rx="12"/>
  <text x="210" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#1565C0">Text Classification Applications</text>

  <!-- Main Input Box -->
  <rect x="160" y="70" width="100" height="40" fill="#2196F3" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="210" y="95" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Text Input
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Classification Center -->
  <circle cx="210" cy="150" r="30" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="0.6s" fill="freeze"/>
  </circle>
  <text x="210" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Classifier
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrow from Input to Classifier -->
  <path d="M210 110L210 120" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="210,120 213,115 207,115" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="0.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <!-- Sentiment Analysis -->
  <rect x="50" y="200" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.2s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="110" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Sentiment Analysis
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.4s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Spam Detection -->
  <rect x="190" y="200" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="250" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Spam Detection
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="1.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Topic Labeling -->
  <rect x="330" y="200" width="120" height="40" fill="#64B5F6" rx="5" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.4s" begin="1.8s" fill="freeze"/>
  </rect>
  <text x="390" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="11" fill="white" opacity="0">
    Topic Labeling
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.0s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <!-- Arrows from Classifier to Applications -->
  <path d="M180 180L120 200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="120,200 125,197 125,203" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <path d="M210 180L250 200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="250,200 245,197 245,203" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.3s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <path d="M240 180L330 200" stroke="#1565C0" stroke-width="2" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </path>
  <polygon points="330,200 325,197 325,203" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.5s" fill="freeze"/>
  </polygon>

  <!-- Output Labels -->
  <text x="110" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Positive/Negative
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.7s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <text x="250" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Spam/Ham
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="2.9s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>

  <text x="390" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-family="Arial" font-size="10" fill="#1565C0" opacity="0">
    Topic Categories
    <animate attributeName="opacity" from="0" to="1" dur="0.3s" begin="3.1s" fill="freeze"/>
  </text>
</svg>
